implementation_summary.summary: CP00-888 closes the RP29 Commercial Readiness P06 permission-matrix tail and opens the P07 failure-recovery foundation across RP29.P06.M06.S07-RP29.P07.M02.S17. It binds AI retrieval, audit hint, matched-rule, deny-over-allow, hold/wall/ACL, route, trimming, fixture, and leak-prevention permission rows plus failure taxonomy, missing-context, cross-tenant, permission-denied, rollback, compensation, blocked-claim, fixture, smoke, audit-hint, and Hermes failure evidence rows as descriptor-only evidence with no runtime recovery, rollback, retry, compensation execution, runtime receipt, product-state write, unauthorized data, real client data, credentials, or secrets.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-888 RP29.P06.M06.S07-RP29.P07.M02.S17 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
